creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: Thanks. I looked at this previously, and ended up stuck because audio/dssi only has a Qt4 version -- but I see now that that's a BUILD_DEPENDS. Disabling the Qt4 UI is a good idea. There's an easier way to suppress subversion detection, although I'd need to look it up (CMAKE_ARGS += -DCMAKE_NO_FIND_Subversion or something like that).
